title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 620.450 - Executive department to promote tourism
text:
620.450.  Executive department to promote tourism. — The executive department shall have the duty of promoting tourism in the state of Missouri in accordance with sections 620.450 to 620.465 and shall, through the commission established herein, exercise the powers set forth in sections 620.450 to 620.465.
(L. 1967 p. 368 § 1) 
Transferred 1986; formerly 258.300
